description: Combined CLI for multiple API services
auth_description: Google OAuth2 access token for the Google Business Profile APIs. Prefer `google-business-profile-pp-cli login`; use the env var only when you already have a short-lived access token.

novel_features.name: Offline account-and-location archive
novel_features.description: Build a local SQLite archive of Google Business Profile resources so agents can inspect accounts and locations without re-hitting the API on every question.

novel_features.name: Archive health snapshot
novel_features.description: Show local archive freshness and sync state across resource tables so operators know whether offline answers are still trustworthy.

novel_features.name: Local GBP search fallback
novel_features.description: Search locally synced Business Profile data with FTS5 when a native API search path is absent or live auth is unavailable.

novel_features.name: Archive analytics for rollout audits
novel_features.description: Run grouped analytics over synced data to count resources and surface distribution patterns without exporting to spreadsheets first.

novel_features.name: Live change tailing
novel_features.description: Poll the API and emit NDJSON change events so operators can watch location-related activity in near real time.
